description.en: Open a persistent dictionary. The filename specified is the base filename for the underlying database. As a side-effect, an extension may be added to the filename and more than one file may be created. By default, the underlying database file is opened for reading and writing. The optional flag parameter has the same interpretation as the flag parameter of dbm.open(). By default, pickles created with pickle.DEFAULT_PROTOCOL are used to serialize values. The version of the pickle protocol can ...
